arts.ttl: Joe Rothwell and Mateo Joseph absences for Luton Town vs Leeds United explained as Gnonto starts
arts.sum: In midfield, Ethan Ampadu begins his first away game since Watford in February and is partnered by Ao Tanaka, who was benched against Swansea for the same reasons as Firpo. Starting XI: Darlow; Bogle, Rodon, Struijk, Firpo; Ampadu, Tanaka; James, Gnonto, James; Piroe.

arts.ttl: Confident Luton are looking to derail Leeds United's title push at Kenilworth Road
arts.sum: Town have taken 10 points out of a possible 15

arts.ttl: Luton v Leeds: Farke has huge XI calls to make
arts.sum: Farke has to buck that trend that Leeds fans know all too well, and included in his task are a few contentious selection headaches that he must get right. Dwelling on the failures of March isn’t going to get Leeds anywhere, but Farke knows that his side has to improve if they want to finish top of the pile.

arts.ttl: Inside Daniel Farke's dressing room behaviour as Leeds United 'elephant in the room' addressed
arts.sum: "Then Ao loses a one-against-one duel, Illan is there with a situation where he should save the strike all day long and this changes the whole picture of the decisions. (He comes off after) 60 minutes, standing ovation for him, 1-0, we can bring the loved Ao Tanaka on, you think all the decisions are right.

arts.ttl: How to watch Luton vs Leeds United - TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Leeds United will look to put an end to their disappointing run of form at Saturday lunchtime when they travel to Luton Town in the EFL Championship. Victory at Kenilworth Road would see Leeds move back to the top of the Championship with the Blades in action against Oxford United at 3pm.

arts.ttl: Leeds United: Willy Gnonto itching to start v Luton
arts.sum: One of those is getting Willy Gnonto into the starting lineup, something that appears a non-negotiable decision after multiple impressive showings off the bench, including what he thought was going to be a winner against Swansea last time out. Leeds United winger Willy Gnonto is fighting for a long-awaited start after a handful of impressive cameos off the bench.

arts.ttl: Karl Darlow selection is not the only big Leeds call Farke must make vs Luton
arts.sum: The big talking point has been on the goalkeeper situation and Illan Meslier - and Daniel Farke has already revealed his selection decision for the weekend. United have won just once in their last five games, which denotes their poorest form this season and at the worst time too.
